home.title:
No Way
Creative Production
home.subtitle: Minimal, editorial visuals — photography & film crafted with intention. Based in Rotterdam. Available for the Netherlands and international projects.

services.title: Fashion
services.description: Editorial & lookbook shoots, creative direction, styling collaboration.

services.title: Wedding
services.description: Photography & video with a calm, documentary approach.

services.title: Campaign
services.description: Brand campaigns, social-first content, short-form reels.

services.title: Product
services.description: Textile & product imagery for e-commerce and premium branding.

booking.title: How booking works
booking.text: 1) You send an inquiry → 2) We align on concept & moodboard → 3) Shoot day → 4) Delivery preview + final set. Starting prices can be added later.

about.title: About
about.text: **Hilal Aydoğdu** — photographer & filmmaker. I create minimal, editorial visuals for fashion, weddings, campaigns and products. Based in Rotterdam.

portfolio_page.title: Portfolio
portfolio_page.intro: Add portfolio images and videos from the admin panel. Keep it tight: 24–36 strong pieces is enough to look premium.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Fastest: email or Instagram DM. Contact details can be edited from the admin panel.

footer.text: Hilal Aydoğdu · No Way Creative Production · Rotterdam
